programme.title: Night Stalkers-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: A wilderness guide and a software engineer try to endure 21 days in the Botswana desert. S14 E05.

programme.title: Fallen Farmer-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: A vet and a farmer tackle the deadly bush of Zambia where territorial animals wander. S14 E03.

programme.title: Next Gen Survival-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Two children of veteran survivalists try to prove they are as good as their parents. S14 E06.

programme.title: Haunted and Hungry-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: A former Marine and a Mississippi mom try to endure 21 days in a haunted Colombian swamp. S14 E02.

programme.title: Opposites Don't Attract-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: An EMT and a hard-headed homesteader try to survive in a coastal Colombian jungle. S14 E08.

programme.title: Moab Desert-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Survivalist Bear Grylls faces the punishing heat of the Moab desert in Utah. S01 E02.

programme.title: Panama-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls tackles some extreme survival challenges in the infamous viper pits of Panama. S02 E03.

programme.title: Western Pacific-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear is on an island near Papua New Guinea where he wades across a shark-infested channel. S05 E01.

programme.title: Georgiaeastern Europe-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear is in the Caucasus Mountains driving a snowmobile out the back of a helicopter. S05 E03.

programme.title: Malaysian Archipelago-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls tries to survive in the challenging conditions of the Bornean archipelago. S06 E05.

programme.title: Desert Survivor-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls will have to skin and disembowel a camel in an attempt to stay alive. S02 E02.

programme.title: Desert Survivor-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls will have to skin and disembowel a camel in an attempt to stay alive. S02 E02.

programme.title: Bears Top 25 Man Moments-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: A survival expert tries to survive the sweltering, crocodile-infested Northern Territory. S05 E02.

programme.title: North Africa-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear is stranded in Northern Africa and gets jugaad in finding water, food and a shelter. S04 E13.

programme.title: Scotland-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Adventurer Bear Grylls faces extreme conditions in Scotland's Cairngorm Mountains. S01 E15.

programme.title: Moab Desert-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Survivalist Bear Grylls faces the punishing heat of the Moab desert in Utah. S01 E02.

programme.title: Iceland-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls shows how to survive extreme conditions in Iceland through various methods. S01 E11.

programme.title: Mexico-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls demonstrates how to survive in Mexico's Copper Canyon. S01 E12.

programme.title: Arctic Circle-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls travels to the freezing Arctic Circle and survives hunting a reindeer. S04 E01.

programme.title: Cicadas & Mulberries-WildFed
programme.desc: The host searches for wild ingredients and turns them into gourmet meals for loved ones. S02 E01.

programme.title: Exploring The Unknown With Wang Yibo
programme.desc: Chinese actor and singer Wang Yibo undertakes outdoor adventures in extreme environments.

programme.title: Vietnam-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls tackles rocky terrain and deadly creatures deep in the heart of Vietnam. S04 E03.
